rerouted_to_other_state.name: Morningside Commons
rerouted_to_other_state.reason: morningsidecommonsvt.com is a Brattleboro VT condo; banked under NH due to county-name overlap

ceiling_explanation: NH SoS QuickStart is Akamai-walled; no open-data SoS export available

Keyword-Serper banks ~70% noise (town planning packets, ADU explainers, court opinions) in NE states with municipal-website indexing; classifier doesn't always reject them, so a post-import LLM-assisted rename pass is required
Real condo-mgmt portals (TownSq, AppFolio, CINC, ManageBuilding) are walled per-resident-login
next_step_to_break_ceiling: either build a Playwright NH SoS scraper, or fold the LLM-assisted post-import rename + delete pass into the runner so the cleanup happens automatically

new_admin_endpoints_landed_during_run.purpose: hard-delete one or more HOAs (cascade chunks/documents/hoa_locations/proxy tables); needed because rename-hoa merge can only consolidate, never delete the final consolidated target
